en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Italy Self-Certification of Technical Professional Requirements in the Italy Self-Certification of Technical Professional Requirements Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Italy Self-Certification of Technical Professional Requirements

The Italy Self-Certification of Technical Professional Requirements is a formal written declaration by a business, contractor, or self-employed professional confirming possession of the technical competence and professional qualifications required to perform regulated activities under Italian law- most commonly in the construction, facility management, and occupational safety sectors. It serves as evidence of compliance with statutory obligations related to workplace safety (Legislative Decree 81) and technical system requirements (Ministerial Decree 37), allowing affirmation that all applicable standards and qualifications have been met when carrying out works, services, or supplies subject to health, safety, and technical compliance oversight.\n\nPresidential Decree 445 Article 47
